headline: Woman's 'Glow Up' Is Just Her Learning A New Filter And Forgetting Her Real Face
summary: 'This is my face,' Amanda said. 'That's a filter,' her friend said. 'It's a filter on my face,' Amanda said.
fullBody: Amanda Glow posted a 'transformation' photo. It was just a new filter. 'This is the real me,' Amanda said. The real her has flawless skin, bigger eyes, and contour she didn't apply. 'I'm just enhancing,' Amanda said. Her friends have started a 'filter or no filter' game. Amanda has lost 0 times because she's always filtered. 'I like the real me,' Amanda said. The real her is a filter.
